title: hymenophyllum assurgens
intro: Hymenophyllum assurgens, also known as the ascended scale fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum assurgens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. It can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
